name: James Hardie Industries Plc
analysis: JHX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$34.6200, stop A$30.8286, target A$45.9942 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
